intro: Between 13 and 26 April 2026, ZCyberNews published 21 articles under the threat-intelligence tag, with nine rated high severity. The most frequently observed threat actors were GopherWhisper, Handala Hack, and LockBit. These campaigns primarily targeted government, financial services, technology, critical-infrastructure, and cybersecurity sectors. Affected regions included Asia, Europe, Iran, North America, and Global operations. The coverage mix consisted of eight informational pieces, nine high-severity reports, and two medium-severity analyses.
